title: 10Pcs Door Handle Springs Replacement with Circlips, 2 Turn Black Door Handle Spring Kit (2mm Thick) for Left or Right Internal Lever Handle Repair – Easy DIY Fix(5 Springs 2mm Thick 5 Circlip)
features: Quick Fix for Sagging Handles: This kit includes 5 door handle springs replacement and 5 circlips, ideal for restoring worn or loose lever handles without replacing the full mechanism.
2mm Thick Dual-Turn Design: Each door handle spring is crafted with a 2-turn coil and precise 2mm thickness, offering strong return tension and consistent function over time.
Black Finish for Durability: Our door handle springs 2 turn black are made of robust carbon steel with a protective black coating to reduce rust and maintain strength during everyday use.
Fits Both Left & Right-Hand Doors: These door handle springs 2 turn are symmetrical and can be installed on either side, making them suitable for a wide range of internal door handles.
Essential DIY Repair Kit: Whether you're maintaining your own home or multiple properties, these door handle springs 2 turn black exterior offer a simple, cost-effective repair solution.
description: Solve loose or non-returning handles easily with this 5-pair door handle springs replacement kit. It includes 5 double-turn coil springs and 5 matching circlips—perfect for repairing lever-style interior door handles. Each spring is 2mm thick and formed in a 2-turn coil shape, providing the proper tension to restore handle return motion and eliminate sagging. Made from durable carbon steel with a black anti-corrosion coating, these springs are built to last through frequent daily use. These door handle springs 2 turn black are universal in design, suitable for both left- and right-handed door handles. The symmetrical form ensures compatibility across common internal door hardware. Simple to install without special tools, just remove your old spring, fit the new one along with the included circlip, and your handle will feel like new. Whether you're a DIY beginner or a home maintenance pro, this small kit can save time and money. Great for landlords, home renovators, or anyone who wants a practical and effective way to extend the life of door hardware. Keep a set on hand in case future repairs are needed—small parts, big impact.
